Class AbstractTextResourceWriteRenderer<T extends AbstractTextResourceWrite>

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render.AbstractTextResourceWriteRenderer<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The type of the file write DTO, extending AbstractTextResourceWrite.
All Implemented Interfaces:
ParameterRenderer<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
CodeRefinementBatchRenderer, DeprecatedCodeRefinementBatchRendererPolymorphic, FullTextResourceUpdateRenderer, TextResourceLineEditsRenderer, TextResourceReplacementsRenderer
public abstract class AbstractTextResourceWriteRenderer<T extends AbstractTextResourceWrite> extends Object implements ParameterRenderer<T>
Base class for rendering file write operations (full updates or surgical replacements) using the NetBeans native diff viewer decorated with agentic annotations.

This renderer implements a sophisticated Decorator Pattern to overcome the limitations of the NetBeans Diff module, which typically isolates its sidebars from the standard annotation system. By using a JLayer with a custom DiffAnnotationsLayerUI, we are able to paint comic-style AI comment bubbles directly over the diff visualizer without modifying its internal component hierarchy.

Key Features:

  • Immediate Pre-Flight Validation: Delegates to the authoritative AbstractTextResourceWrite.validate(Agi) logic to reject hallucinated or stale proposals as soon as they are rendered.
  • Historical Diff Persistence: Automatically captures the file state before execution and persists it in the tool call DTO.
  • JLayer Decoration: Safely overlays AI content without disrupting the internal component tree of the NetBeans Diff module.

Research Credits - This implementation was made possible by dissecting the following NetBeans internal components to understand the coordinate mapping and layout management of the Diff Viewer, Do not delete this list as it is essential for mantaining this renderer:

  • org.netbeans.modules.editor.NbEditorUtilities
  • org.openide.text.NbDocument
  • org.openide.text.Line
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.DiffViewImpl
  • org.netbeans.api.diff.StreamSource
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.LinesComponent
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.DEditorPane
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.editable.LineNumbersActionsBar
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.editable.EditableDiffView
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.editable.DiffViewManager
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.editable.DiffContentPanel
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.editable.DiffSplitPaneDivider
  • org.netbeans.modules.diff.builtin.visualizer.editable.DecoratedEditorPane
Author:
anahata

    The agi panel where this renderer is hosted.

    container
    Container panel with a height cap to prevent "blank line heaps" from corrupting the conversation layout.

    controller
    The NetBeans DiffController instance responsible for managing the two-pane visualizer and synchronized scrolling.

    The JLayer container wrapping the NetBeans diff visualizer.

    The UI layer responsible for painting AI annotations (bubbles and icons) over the diff visualizer.

    Creates the top header panel containing the file link and annotation toggle.
    protected JComponent
    createIntentPanel()
    Subclasses can provide a specialized panel to display the raw 'Surgical Intent' (e.g., a list of insertions, replacements, and deletions) at the top of the diff viewer.
    protected abstract T
    createUpdatedDto(String newContent)
    Subclasses must be able to create a new DTO instance with updated content when the user manually edits the proposed document in the UI.
    private void
    fixSplitPane(Component c)
    Forces the internal JSplitPane of the NetBeans diff viewer to a 50/50 split by recursively searching for the split pane component.

    Returns the Swing component that performs the rendering.

  • Field Details

    • agiPanel

      protected AgiPanel agiPanel
      The agi panel where this renderer is hosted.

    • call

      protected AbstractToolCall<?,?> call
      The tool call associated with this parameter.

    • paramName

      protected String paramName
      The name of the parameter being rendered.

    • update

      protected T extends AbstractTextResourceWrite update
      The current state of the file write update.

    • container

      protected final JPanel container
      Container panel with a height cap to prevent "blank line heaps" from corrupting the conversation layout.

    • controller

      private org.netbeans.api.diff.DiffController controller
      The NetBeans DiffController instance responsible for managing the two-pane visualizer and synchronized scrolling.

    • modDoc

      private Document modDoc
      The document containing the proposed modifications. This document is editable, allowing the user to refine the AI's proposal before execution.

    • lastRenderedUpdate

      private T extends AbstractTextResourceWrite lastRenderedUpdate
      The last rendered update DTO. Used to verify if an incoming update requires a full visualizer re-render.

    • lastRenderedStatus

      private ToolExecutionStatus lastRenderedStatus
      The last rendered status of the tool call response. Required to detect transitions from proposal to application.

    • layerUI

      private DiffAnnotationsLayerUI layerUI
      The UI layer responsible for painting AI annotations (bubbles and icons) over the diff visualizer.

    • jlayer

      private JLayer<JComponent> jlayer
      The JLayer container wrapping the NetBeans diff visualizer. This is the entry point for the decoration logic.

    • tabs

      private JTabbedPane tabs
      The internal tab switcher of the NetBeans visualizer.

    • recommendedTabIndex

      private int recommendedTabIndex
      The tab index recommended based on diff size (0=Graphical, 1=Textual).

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractTextResourceWriteRenderer

      protected AbstractTextResourceWriteRenderer()
      No-arg constructor for factory instantiation.

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(AgiPanel agiPanel, AbstractToolCall<?,?> call, String paramName, T value)
      Initializes the renderer with its context.
      Specified by:
      init in interface ParameterRenderer<T extends AbstractTextResourceWrite>
      Parameters:
      agiPanel - The parent agi panel.
      call - The tool call being rendered.
      paramName - The name of the parameter.
      value - The initial value.

    • getComponent

      public JComponent getComponent()
      Returns the Swing component that performs the rendering.
      Specified by:
      getComponent in interface ParameterRenderer<T extends AbstractTextResourceWrite>
      Returns:
      The rendering component.

    • updateContent

      public void updateContent(T value)
      Updates the renderer with a new value.
      Specified by:
      updateContent in interface ParameterRenderer<T extends AbstractTextResourceWrite>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value to render.

    • validatePreFlight

      private boolean validatePreFlight()
      Performs an immediate validation of the file write using the authoritative logic in the Files toolkit. If validation fails, the tool call is rejected immediately with a diff of the failed intent.
      Returns:
      true if valid, false if rejected.

    • getLineComments

      protected abstract List<LineComment> getLineComments()
      Subclasses can provide line-level comments to be displayed in the diff gutter.
      Returns:
      A list of LineComment objects.

    • createIntentPanel

      protected JComponent createIntentPanel()
      Subclasses can provide a specialized panel to display the raw 'Surgical Intent' (e.g., a list of insertions, replacements, and deletions) at the top of the diff viewer.
      Returns:
      The intent component, or null.

    • createUpdatedDto

      protected abstract T createUpdatedDto(String newContent)
      Subclasses must be able to create a new DTO instance with updated content when the user manually edits the proposed document in the UI.
      Parameters:
      newContent - The edited content from the document.
      Returns:
      A new DTO instance of type T.

    • getInitialTabIndex

      protected int getInitialTabIndex()
      Returns the index of the tab that should be selected by default when the visualizer is first rendered.
      Returns:
      0 for Graphical, 1 for Textual.

    • render

      public boolean render()
      Triggers the rendering logic.

      The main rendering loop. Performs pre-flight validation, initializes the NetBeans Diff system, and installs the agentic decoration layer.

      Specified by:
      render in interface ParameterRenderer<T extends AbstractTextResourceWrite>
      Returns:
      True if a visual update occurred.

    • renderError

      private void renderError(String message)
      Renders a multi-line error message when diff generation fails.
      Parameters:
      message - The detailed error message.

    • createHeaderPanel

      private JPanel createHeaderPanel(Resource resource, List<LineComment> comments, JCheckBox toggle, ToolExecutionStatus status)
      Creates the top header panel containing the file link and annotation toggle.
      Parameters:
      resource - The managed resource.
      comments - The list of comments for line jumping.
      toggle - The checkbox used to toggle AI comments.
      status - The current execution status of the tool.
      Returns:
      The populated header JPanel.

    • fixSplitPane

      private void fixSplitPane(Component c)
      Forces the internal JSplitPane of the NetBeans diff viewer to a 50/50 split by recursively searching for the split pane component.
      Parameters:
      c - The component to start the search from.

    • configureTextualTabWithEditorPrefHeight

      @Deprecated private int configureTextualTabWithEditorPrefHeight()
      Deprecated.
      NetBeans doesnwont report the correct height.
      Configures the textual tab by using the JEditorPane's reported preferred size. This method also disables internal vertical scrollbars to let the conversation handle the vertical flow.
      Returns:
      The preferred height, or -1 if components are missing.

    • configureTextualTabWithCalculatedEditorHeight

      private int configureTextualTabWithCalculatedEditorHeight()
      Configures the textual tab by manually calculating the height based on font metrics and document line count. This method also disables internal vertical scrollbars.
      Returns:
      The calculated height, or -1 if components are missing.

    • applyVisualizerSettings

      private void applyVisualizerSettings(Component c, boolean isProposedSide)
      Injects custom client properties into the NetBeans component tree. This method recursively scans the visualizer to enable the merger UI and sets the editability of the proposed side editor based on its role property or physical position in a split pane.
      Parameters:
      c - The component to start the configuration from.
      isProposedSide - Whether the component is on the proposed side of a split.
